faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Harrison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Harrison residents most commonly encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Pavement ants are especially prevalent around sidewalks and building foundations, while carpenter ants can damage wooden structures in Harrison's older homes. Our $350-$550 treatment addresses all common ant species in the area.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Harrison residents. Most ant control treatments take 1-2 hours to complete, and you'll notice a significant reduction in ant activity within 24-48 hours. We service all Harrison neighborhoods, typically arriving within 2-4 hours of your call.
